rows.label: bf06290100_0050
rows.name:
What's this "for the world's sake"?
Even excuses have their limits.

rows.label: bf06290100_0070
rows.name:
Piling excuse upon excuse we're
now completely bound in chains.

rows.label: bf06290100_0080
rows.name:
But maybe our boy
could sever those chains.

rows.label: bf06290100_0100
rows.name: Do you not want to bet on him?

rows.label: bf06290100_0110
rows.name:
Hey, whatever. If you believe in him,
my Prince, I'm with you all the way.

rows.label: bf06290100_0130
rows.name:
Sometimes he's too pure
and that's dangerous.

rows.label: bf06290100_0140
rows.name:
But isn't it our duty as adults to
give him a little help with that?

rows.label: bf06290100_0150
rows.name:
Yeah. I like that
about you, my Prince.

rows.label: bf06290100_0170
rows.name:
What are you saying now?
You've always made me suffer.
